summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly identifies this as an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. All five hydrated PRs are open, non-security-sensitive, and should remain independently tracked for maintainer review; close, merge, fix, and raise-pr actions are not allowed or not supported by the hydrated evidence.

actions.reason: Standalone docs PR with supplied proof and passing relevant checks; keep for maintainer review rather than close in this inventory shard.
Focused but technically substantive Telegram compatibility/config PR with a failing behavior-proof check; not a duplicate or low-signal close candidate.
Maintainer-owned focused test/docs coverage PR with passing relevant checks; keep independently for maintainer decision because merge is blocked by job policy and no duplicate canonical is hydrated.
Focused bug-fix PR tied to an unhydrated linked issue and failing behavior proof; keep independently for maintainer review rather than close or mark as candidate fix.
Maintainer-owned focused compatibility fix with passing relevant checks; keep independently for maintainer review because merge/fix actions are blocked and no closure basis exists.
